## What changed

Describe the user-visible result and the reason for the change.

## Validation

List every command or manual check run and its result.

```text
pnpm check
pnpm test:ui
cargo test --workspace
```

## Packaging and platform impact

- [ ] No packaging or platform-specific behavior changed.
- [ ] Windows behavior was checked or is explicitly unverified.
- [ ] Linux behavior was checked or is explicitly unverified.
- [ ] macOS behavior was checked or is explicitly unverified.

## Screenshots and fixtures

Include before/after screenshots for UI changes. Name any KiCad example used for manual verification, and confirm that attached project files may be redistributed.
